title: Stance
description: A panel member's current position, emitted in Phase 1 (prep) and after each Phase 2 round.
$comment: No fields are required on purpose. A required list makes the host reject an empty {} submission and re-prompt; a degenerate model then re-submits empty forever (no agent-layer retry cap), hanging the round. With nothing required, an empty stance validates and is normalized into a logged abstention. The prompt still asks for every field; this is the safety net.

preferredOption.description: The option this member currently favors. May be one already on the slate OR one they put forward in proposedOptions.

confidence.description: How strongly the member holds this position.

reasons.description: Grounded reasons. Each should be traceable to the context pack, repo, or tool results — never invented.

concerns.description: Blocking concerns or risks the member sees with their own preferred option.

objectionsToOthers.description: Substantive objections to other members' positions (drives cross-talk).

openQuestions.description: What this member still needs answered to commit.

proposedOptions.description: Options this member puts on the table (new, reframed, or split/merged). The facilitator folds these into the live slate between rounds.

changedFromLastRound.description: Did the preferred option or a material reason change since the previous round? Used by the facilitator's convergence check. Always false in the Phase 1 prep stance.
